locator.quote: cls% from BC's collapsed 5-26% range back up to 41.2% — actually

text: BC label augmentation mechanically works: F2 (close+hold labels) restored cls% from BC's collapsed 5-26% range back up to 41.2%.

locator.quote: HIGHER than the no-BC baseline C2 (38.7%). The fundamental

text: F2's restored cls% (41.2%) was higher than the no-BC baseline C2 (38.7%) — the fundamental 'BC kills close_signal' problem is solved.

locator.quote: 3.2% and opens fell to 93 (below the 100-180 target band).

text: The trade-off F2 showed is selection regression: mat% dropped to 3.2% and opens fell to 93 (below the 100-180 target band), addressed by adding NOOP-at-oracle-negative labels back.
